message:
fix(server): deadlock detection perf, TUI safety, HTML escaping in tests, fresh agent lookups

- Replace O(n) Vec::contains with HashMap for agent dedup in
  find_deadlock_cycles (atc.rs)
- Use get_agent_by_id_fresh in cleanup to avoid stale cache reads
- Fix HTML test assertions to account for forward-slash escaping,
  add attachment round-trip verification in mail_ui tests
- Relax lifetime bounds and reduce allocations in dashboard rendering,
  add bounds checks on heatmap grid access
- Use safe fallback instead of unwrap_or for missing thread messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
